testcase.name: test_preview_endpoint_exists

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_comic_storybook_v2_iteration89.py:189: in setup assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_all_8_genres_accepted

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_comic_storybook_v2_iteration89.py:221: in setup assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_valid_page_counts

error.message: failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers. reset reason: connection termination assert 503 == 200 + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_comic_storybook_v2_iteration89.py:254: in setup assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers. reset reason: connection termination E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code
